[ ] adds new holdings entries. Person Signing this Report on Behalf of Reporting Manager: Name: Marc D. Hamburg ------------------------ Title: Vice President ------------------------ Phone: 402-346-1400 ------------------------ Signature, Place, and Date of Signing: (s) Marc D. Hamburg Omaha, NE February 14, 2005 ---------------------------- ------------------ ----------------- [Signature] [City, State] [Date]

Included in this information is information regarding Berkshire's position in Sun Trust Banks Inc. included in its June 30, 2004 public Form 13F.
